## Why

## How to test

<!--
Minimum steps a reviewer can run to verify the change. For generator/workflow changes, this usually means running `node generator/index.js` and checking the diff. For README/badge changes, describe what should render and where.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `node generator/index.js` runs cleanly
- [ ] `repo.json` and `downloads.json` are either unchanged or the intended update is included
- [ ] If this touches `plugins.json`, the new entry's source repo has a valid `repo.json` and a published release
- [ ] If this changes user-visible behavior (README, badges, install steps), README is updated
